mncTotals.Description: Plugin for quickly creating Totals with the possibility of obtaining values from the drawing
mncTotals.FullDescription: Plugin collects data from tables inserted into the current document. The list of reference documents is collected according to the regulatory documents that are present in the plugin database
mncTotals.h6: If this option is enabled and the current document is saved, the shared data file (Drawing name_Totals.xml) will be automatically created in the current drawing location directory when the plugin starts
mncTotals.h16: Get Totals from model or specified layouts
mncTotals.h33: Formats from list (in form of blocks):
mncTotals.h35: Search in layouts is made on tables without taking into account the format! It is conventionally accepted that one layout corresponds to one format
mncTotals.h37: Tables are not saved to file! After closing, all data will be lost!\nAre you sure you want to close the window?
mncTotals.h39: The selected item will be permanently deleted\nContinue?
mncTotals.h44: Overwrite existing tables?\nYes – overwrite, No – supplement
mncTotals.h45: No blocks found in the current space!
mncTotals.h47: In the table file not found a table with a table style
mncTotals.h48: Run the "Tables" plugin to overwrite the table file
mncTotals.h49: No file with tables found!\nYou need to start the "Tables" plugin
mncTotals.h51: The view screen is cropped by an unhandled object!
mncTotals.h55: No endpoints have been selected for searching!
mncTotals.h56: No variants have been chosen for searching the format!
mncTotals.h57: No layouts have been selected for searching!
mncTotals.h61: You must select one or more drawings in the list of open drawings or set the checkbox "Search only in current drawing"
mncTotals.h64: There is modified data that can be written back
